title: frangula longipes
intro: Frangula longipes, also known as the Himalayan buckthorn, is a plant species in the family Rhamnaceae. The medicinal properties of Frangula longipes lie in its roots and bark, which contain anthraquinone glycosides, responsible for its laxative and purgative effects. The health benefits of Frangula longipes include its ability to aid digestion, relieve constipation, and support the removal of toxins from the body. Frangula longipes can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its potent effects.
